meaning: adj.拉马克的(拉马克是法国博物学家)
examples: So, this made evolution suddenly Lamarckian, instead of Darwinian.
In a mathematical sense, Lamarckian evolution injects a bit of learning into the soup.
A modern lamarckian theory emphasizing the importance of environmental factors in genetic changes and retaining the notion of the inheritance of acquired characters.
And if some extraterrestrials are perched even higher on the Lamarckian ladder than we are, why not give ourselves a boost by following their example?
